title: Extend UNUSED to flag signals which are not in the cone of a module output

features.name: signals_only_driving_each_other_in_dead_code_cycle
features.description: Code should include two signals that form a dead code cycle by only driving each other, where neither signal feeds any module output

features.name: signal_not_in_cone_of_output
features.description: Code should include a signal that is driven but does not feed any output port of the module

features.name: nonblocking_assignment_to_internal_signal
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with nonblocking assignment to a signal that is only consumed by internal signals, not by any output
